A

AuthErrorCatalog - Enum Class in pe.quillqasoft.dev.core.catalog.auth
Catalog for all authentication and authorization related exceptions.

B

BaseException - Exception Class in pe.quillqasoft.dev.core.model
Base abstract class for all custom exceptions within the application.
BaseException() - Constructor for exception class pe.quillqasoft.dev.core.model.BaseException
Protected constructor that initializes exception properties.
BaseException.Builder<E> - Class in pe.quillqasoft.dev.core.model
Builder class for dynamically constructing instances of BaseException subclasses by overriding properties mapped in the default catalog.
BaseExceptionCatalog - Interface in pe.quillqasoft.dev.core.catalog
Interface that defines the contract for all exception catalogs.
build() - Method in class pe.quillqasoft.dev.core.model.BaseException.Builder
Finalizes the build process and instantiates the specific exception class.
builder() - Static method in exception class pe.quillqasoft.dev.exception.auth.ForbiddenException
Creates a builder to construct a customized ForbiddenException.
builder() - Static method in exception class pe.quillqasoft.dev.exception.auth.InvalidCredentialsException
Creates a builder to construct a customized InvalidCredentialsException.
builder() - Static method in exception class pe.quillqasoft.dev.exception.auth.TokenExpiredException
Creates a builder to construct a customized TokenExpiredException.
builder() - Static method in exception class pe.quillqasoft.dev.exception.auth.UnauthorizedException
Creates a builder to construct a customized UnauthorizedException.
builder() - Static method in exception class pe.quillqasoft.dev.exception.business.GenericBusinessException
Creates a builder to construct a customized GenericBusinessException.
builder() - Static method in exception class pe.quillqasoft.dev.exception.database.GenericDatabaseException
Creates a builder to construct a customized GenericDatabaseException.
builder() - Static method in exception class pe.quillqasoft.dev.exception.generic.GenericRuntimeException
Creates a builder to construct a customized GenericRuntimeException.
builder() - Static method in exception class pe.quillqasoft.dev.exception.http.HttpException
Creates a builder to construct a customized HttpException.
builder() - Static method in exception class pe.quillqasoft.dev.exception.http.NotFoundException
Creates a builder to construct a customized NotFoundException.
builder() - Static method in exception class pe.quillqasoft.dev.exception.http.ValidException
Creates a builder to construct a customized ValidException.
builder() - Static method in exception class pe.quillqasoft.dev.exception.http.WebClientException
Creates a builder to construct a customized WebClientException.
Builder(Class<E>) - Constructor for class pe.quillqasoft.dev.core.model.BaseException.Builder
Initializes a builder for the specified exception class and preloads default catalog values.
BusinessErrorCatalog - Enum Class in pe.quillqasoft.dev.core.catalog.business
Catalog for business logic and domain rule violations.

D

DatabaseErrorCatalog - Enum Class in pe.quillqasoft.dev.core.catalog.database
Catalog for database related exceptions.

E

ExceptionDef - Annotation Interface in pe.quillqasoft.dev.core.annotation
Annotation used to bind a specific exception class to its corresponding error catalog.

F

FORBIDDEN - Enum constant in enum class pe.quillqasoft.dev.core.catalog.auth.AuthErrorCatalog
Error indicating the user does not have required permissions (HTTP 403).
ForbiddenException - Exception Class in pe.quillqasoft.dev.exception.auth
Exception thrown when a user is authenticated but does not have the required permissions to access a specific resource.
ForbiddenException() - Constructor for exception class pe.quillqasoft.dev.exception.auth.ForbiddenException
Constructs a new ForbiddenException resolving its default properties from AuthErrorCatalog.

G

GENERIC_BUSINESS - Enum constant in enum class pe.quillqasoft.dev.core.catalog.business.BusinessErrorCatalog
Error indicating a generic business rule violation (HTTP 400).
GENERIC_DATABASE - Enum constant in enum class pe.quillqasoft.dev.core.catalog.database.DatabaseErrorCatalog
Error indicating a generic database access error (HTTP 500).
GENERIC_RUNTIME - Enum constant in enum class pe.quillqasoft.dev.core.catalog.generic.GenericRuntimeErrorCatalog
Error indicating an unexpected internal server error (HTTP 500).
GenericBusinessException - Exception Class in pe.quillqasoft.dev.exception.business
Exception thrown when a general business rule is violated.
GenericBusinessException() - Constructor for exception class pe.quillqasoft.dev.exception.business.GenericBusinessException
Constructs a new GenericBusinessException resolving its default properties from BusinessErrorCatalog.
GenericDatabaseException - Exception Class in pe.quillqasoft.dev.exception.database
Exception thrown when a generic error occurs while accessing or modifying the database.
GenericDatabaseException() - Constructor for exception class pe.quillqasoft.dev.exception.database.GenericDatabaseException
Constructs a new GenericDatabaseException resolving its default properties from DatabaseErrorCatalog.
GenericRuntimeErrorCatalog - Enum Class in pe.quillqasoft.dev.core.catalog.generic
Catalog for generic runtime errors.
GenericRuntimeException - Exception Class in pe.quillqasoft.dev.exception.generic
Exception thrown when an unexpected or uncategorized runtime error occurs.
GenericRuntimeException() - Constructor for exception class pe.quillqasoft.dev.exception.generic.GenericRuntimeException
Constructs a new GenericRuntimeException resolving its default properties from GenericRuntimeErrorCatalog.

H

HTTP - Enum constant in enum class pe.quillqasoft.dev.core.catalog.http.HttpErrorCatalog
Generic HTTP error indicating an unexpected issue processing the request (HTTP 500).
HttpErrorCatalog - Enum Class in pe.quillqasoft.dev.core.catalog.http
Catalog for HTTP and web client communication related exceptions.
HttpException - Exception Class in pe.quillqasoft.dev.exception.http
Exception thrown when a generic HTTP error occurs during the processing of a request.
HttpException() - Constructor for exception class pe.quillqasoft.dev.exception.http.HttpException
Constructs a new HttpException resolving its default properties from HttpErrorCatalog.

I

N

NOT_FOUND - Enum constant in enum class pe.quillqasoft.dev.core.catalog.http.HttpErrorCatalog
Error indicating the requested resource could not be found (HTTP 404).
NotFoundException - Exception Class in pe.quillqasoft.dev.exception.http
Exception thrown when a requested resource could not be found in the system.
NotFoundException() - Constructor for exception class pe.quillqasoft.dev.exception.http.NotFoundException

T

TOKEN_EXPIRED - Enum constant in enum class pe.quillqasoft.dev.core.catalog.auth.AuthErrorCatalog
Error indicating the provided authentication token is no longer valid (HTTP 401).
TokenExpiredException - Exception Class in pe.quillqasoft.dev.exception.auth
Exception thrown when the authentication token provided by the client has expired.
TokenExpiredException() - Constructor for exception class pe.quillqasoft.dev.exception.auth.TokenExpiredException
Constructs a new TokenExpiredException resolving its default properties from AuthErrorCatalog.

U

UNAUTHORIZED - Enum constant in enum class pe.quillqasoft.dev.core.catalog.auth.AuthErrorCatalog
Error indicating an authentication context is missing or invalid (HTTP 401).
UnauthorizedException - Exception Class in pe.quillqasoft.dev.exception.auth
Exception thrown when authentication is required but missing or invalid for a specific resource.
UnauthorizedException() - Constructor for exception class pe.quillqasoft.dev.exception.auth.UnauthorizedException
Constructs a new UnauthorizedException resolving its default properties from AuthErrorCatalog.

V

VALID - Enum constant in enum class pe.quillqasoft.dev.core.catalog.http.HttpErrorCatalog
Error indicating the request failed validation checks (HTTP 400).

Constructs a new ValidException resolving its default properties from HttpErrorCatalog.

W

WEB_CLIENT - Enum constant in enum class pe.quillqasoft.dev.core.catalog.http.HttpErrorCatalog
Error indicating a failure when communicating with an external service (HTTP 502).
WebClientException - Exception Class in pe.quillqasoft.dev.exception.http
Exception thrown when an error occurs during communication with an external web service or API.
WebClientException() - Constructor for exception class pe.quillqasoft.dev.exception.http.WebClientException
Constructs a new WebClientException resolving its default properties from HttpErrorCatalog.

Overrides the default error code.

withExceptionName(String) - Method in class pe.quillqasoft.dev.core.model.BaseException.Builder
Overrides the default exception name.
withMessage(String) - Method in class pe.quillqasoft.dev.core.model.BaseException.Builder
Overrides the default message.
withStatus(int) - Method in class pe.quillqasoft.dev.core.model.BaseException.Builder
